LAW AND MOTION 302, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING ([DEFT'S] DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENCE AND PREMISES LIABILITY SEPARATELY. DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR "NEGLIGENT/INTENTIONAL INFLICTION" SUSTAINED TO THE EXTENT IT ALLEGES INTENTIONAL INFLICTION, AS NO FACTS ARE PLED TO SUPPORT IT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND).
